text: - 1) Each Subcontractor will establish a project safety program in detail, including minimum compliance standards, methods to be used to assure compliance, and shall make it available to Contractor for review upon request. Failure to submit the safety program within 15 days from the date of such request will be grounds to withhold payments to Subcontractors until this requirement is fulfilled. This program shall conform to applicable federal, state and local regulations, as well as Owner Safety Programs.
